bead.title: Add completion channel to background index build (prereq for testable FEAT-013)
bead.description: axon-storage/src/index_builder.rs: IndexBuildInfo currently has no JoinHandle and no completion channel. Tests waiting for index build completion have no option except time.sleep(), which is racy. Change: add a tokio::watch::Receiver<IndexBuildStatus> (or oneshot) to IndexBuildInfo returned by the build initiation call so callers can .await completion deterministically. The build task (tokio::spawn) sends on the channel when state transitions to Ready or fails. No change to the public IndexStatus enum. Prerequisite for axon-5973f060.
bead.acceptance: IndexBuildInfo has a channel field resolving when build transitions to Ready or Failed; test can await completion without sleeping; build failure resolves the channel with an error variant
